mechanism_narrative: A persistently low and stable federal funds rate keeps the equity discount rate compressed, sustaining a positive drift in S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as investors favor risk assets over cash yields.
failure_condition: Rank IC between FEDFUNDS level and forward 20d returns falls below 0.03 over any rolling 2-year walk-forward window, or returns are not significantly higher than unconditional baseline (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE rises more than 0.2 percentage points above its own 3-month moving average, it signals an inflection toward labor market deterioration that historically precedes broader economic slowdowns, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the following quarter.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises > 0.2pp above its trailing 3-month moving average
failure_condition: In more than 50% of historical trigger instances, 60-day forward SPX returns are positive, or the effect is not statistically distinguishable from zero (t-test p > 0.05) across rolling out-of-sample windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous acceleration in RSAFS (retail sales) growth and HOUST (housing starts) growth jointly signal robust consumer and investment demand that is not captured by either series alone, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days as earnings expectations are revised upward.
failure_condition: Joint positive momentum in RSAFS and HOUST fails to outperform either single-series signal in out-of-sample rank IC by a margin > 0.02, or combined signal shows no significant improvement over baseline over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: During late-cycle expansion, continued positive INDPRO growth signals durable industrial output strength that supports corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 returns over the following quarter, but this relationship weakens or reverses outside late-cycle regimes as capacity constraints and margin pressure build.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth shows no significant positive correlation with 60-day forward SPX returns specifically during identified late-cycle periods (rank IC < 0.03), or the sign of the relationship flips across multiple late-cycle episodes.

mechanism_narrative: When year-over-year CPIAUCSL inflation exceeds 4%, markets price in an elevated probability of future monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day forward returns are positive in more than 55% of triggered high-inflation instances, or rank IC conditioned on the trigger falls below 0.02 over rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent month-over-month gains in PAYEMS reflect ongoing labor demand strength that supports near-term consumer spending and risk appetite, producing a modest positive drift in S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC between PAYEMS monthly change and 5-day forward SPX returns is below 0.02 over any rolling 2-year window, or positive PAYEMS prints are not followed by above-median short-horizon returns.

mechanism_narrative: During a monetary tightening cycle (rising FEDFUNDS), a deceleration in GDPC1 growth signals that higher rates are successfully cooling aggregate demand, raising recession risk and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the following quarter; outside tightening regimes the same deceleration has muted market impact.
failure_condition: GDPC1 deceleration during tightening periods fails to precede negative 60-day forward returns in more than 50% of historical episodes, or the effect disappears when isolated from tightening-regime conditioning.

mechanism_narrative: A joint pattern of rising UNRATE combined with falling FEDFUNDS indicates the central bank is reactively easing in response to labor market weakness (a Sahm-rule-like dynamic), which markets interpret as confirmation of imminent recession, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days; neither series alone captures this signal as reliably.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rising 3-month trend while FEDFUNDS falling 3-month trend
regime_hint: early recession or policy pivot regime
failure_condition: In more than 50% of instances where both conditions are jointly triggered, 20-day forward SPX returns are positive, or the joint signal's rank IC does not exceed the maximum of either single-series signal's rank IC by at least 0.02.
